item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 20min Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degener
item.description: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 20min Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degenerates/perverts still gracing the EIS for this one deep into the night. 1 9 150

item.title: GWSnookerTips: George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 1h #Winner Cita George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 15h No bets on my snooker service today (
item.description:
George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 1h #Winner Cita George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 15h No bets on my snooker service today (hard to find any standout value) so I thought I would give you a free fancy which should go close….
Ben Woollaston/Oliver Lines Over 16.5 frames 10/11 Paddy Power/BetVictor
Good luck! 1 266

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 1h "𝙄𝙩’𝙨 𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙙 𝙟𝙪𝙨𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙬𝙞𝙣 𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙤𝙛 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙨𝙚, 𝙨𝙤 𝙩𝙤 𝙬𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙚𝙣 𝙞𝙨 𝙖 𝙜𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙩 𝙛𝙚𝙚𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜."
Recap & reaction as
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 1h "𝙄𝙩’𝙨 𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙙 𝙟𝙪𝙨𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙬𝙞𝙣 𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙤𝙛 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙨𝙚, 𝙨𝙤 𝙩𝙤 𝙬𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙚𝙣 𝙞𝙨 𝙖 𝙜𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙩 𝙛𝙚𝙚𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜."
Recap & reaction as Dobey reaches double figures on the ProTour De live-darts.com 3 1 mil
